name: landing-webgpu-greyed
description: Capability gating — the render.penumbra-backdrop module requires WebGPU + penumbra. On a Chrome that supports WebGPU (the default on the test box), the row should be selectable. This test is intentionally pixel-diff only — its job is to lock the row's visual state on the configured test machine. If the test machine ever changes WebGPU availability, the baseline re-approve will reflect that.
